$comment: An arrangement: an environment's post-deploy configuration overlay, applied AFTER a sheet is deployed. It is a sibling of the sheet (seed/sheets/*.json), not part of the orchestra tree — Casals stores `parameters` and runs `steps` without interpreting them. `parameters` is a flat map of config values handed to canisters; `steps` is an ordered list of declarative calls {target, method, args} where `target` is a registered canister name (or a raw canister id), `method` is a text-in/text-out method, and `args` is the JSON value passed as the single text argument (a bare string is passed verbatim; null/absent means a no-argument call). Exactly one arrangement is active per Casals instance. Loaded + activated by scripts/seed.py --arrangement demo.
name: demo
description: Demo arrangement for the default hello-world orchestra: a couple of illustrative parameters plus one post-deploy step that greets via the Python backend.
